description: Non-interactive decorative badge system with 3 sub-components: BadgeLabel (text labels), BadgeCounter (numeric counts), BadgeDot (status indicator). Theme-aware via component tokens (shade inversion for dark mode). 17 color families × 2 weights.

subComponents.name: BadgeLabel
subComponents.description: Text label badge. Used for data labeling, status display. 2 sizes × 2 shapes × 2 weights × 17 colors.

size.description: Size variant. Controls height and typography.

shape.description: Shape. square = size-specific rounded corners, pill = fully rounded (wider padding).

weight.description: Visual weight. light = light bg + dark text, heavy = dark bg + light text.

color.description: Decorative color family. Maps 1:1 to primitive token names.

weight.light: primitive-{color}-100 bg + primitive-{color}-700 text (some colors use -200/-600 shades)
weight.heavy: primitive-{color}-500 bg + primitive-gray-0 text (yellow uses -400 bg + -950 text)

colorMap.note: Uses badgeColorMap — shared between BadgeLabel and BadgeCounter. Literal Tailwind classes for JIT scanning.

subComponents.name: BadgeCounter
subComponents.description: Counter/tag badge. Used for unread message counts, filter counts, New/Beta tags. Fixed height (16px), always pill shape, min-width 16px. Single-character content renders as circle.

children.description: Counter text. Number or short label ('99+', 'New').

weight.description: Visual weight. Shares badgeColorMap with BadgeLabel.

variants.singleCharBehavior: When content is a single character, width equals height (circle). Otherwise min-width + paddingX.

subComponents.name: BadgeDot
subComponents.description: Circular dot indicator. Used for status display or notification decoration. 8px fixed size with 1px inset white border.

color.description: Decorative color family. Uses own dotColorMap (single shade per color).

colorMap.note: Separate dotColorMap — always uses single -500 shade (gray uses -300).

states.note: All Badge sub-components are non-interactive. No hover, focus, pressed, disabled, or loading states.

color.layer: [data-theme] — component tokens referencing primitive tokens. Theme-dependent shade inversion for dark mode.
color.lightWeight: Light: bg shade-100 + text shade-600~700 → Dark: bg shade-900 + text shade-300 (gray uses 800/300)
color.heavyWeight: Light & Dark same (bg shade-500 + text gray-0). Exceptions: gray (inverted), yellow (400/950 both themes)
color.dot: shade-500 both themes. Exception: gray 300→400 in dark

implementation.colorStrategy: CSS custom property lookup maps (badgeColorMap, dotColorMap) via --comp-badge-* tokens in [data-theme] scope. Enables automatic light/dark theme switching.
implementation.sharedColorMap: badgeColorMap is exported from BadgeLabel and imported by BadgeCounter.
